topic_statement: We’re excited to announce that we’ve signed a Memorandum of Understanding for advanced AI collaboration with Saab, a global leader in defense and security. Together, we’ll explore groundbreaking AI partnerships for their aerospace platforms and deliver tailored solutions critical to Saab’s operations. Read more: https://cohere.link/cquJlw4
